mapper.sql: p.er_id, p.pair_sn, p.dprtr_cntry_cd, p.arvl_cntry_cd, p.cer_estm_yn, p.flt_cnt, p.fuel_type_cd, p.fuel_wght, p.conv_fctr, p.co2_emsn, p.ofst_req_yn, p.cef_redu_amt, p.use_bgng_dt, p.use_end_dt, p.frst_reg_dt, p.frst_reg_user_id, p.last_chg_dt, p.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_er_cntry_pair_co2 p WHERE p.er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt ORDER BY p.pair_sn ASC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(co2_emsn), 0) FROM er.tn_er_cntry_pair_co2 WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_cntry_pair_co2 (er_id, pair_sn, dprtr_cntry_cd, arvl_cntry_cd, cer_estm_yn, flt_cnt, fuel_type_cd, fuel_wght, conv_fctr, co2_emsn, ofst_req_yn, cef_redu_amt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{pairSn}, #{dprtrCntryCd}, #{arvlCntryCd}, #{cerEstmYn}, #{fltCnt}, #{fuelTypeCd}, #{fuelWght}, #{convFctr}, #{co2Emsn}, #{ofstReqYn}, #{cefReduAmt}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_er_cntry_pair_co2 SET dprtr_cntry_cd = #{dprtrCntryCd}, arvl_cntry_cd = #{arvlCntryCd}, cer_estm_yn = #{cerEstmYn}, flt_cnt = #{fltCnt}, fuel_type_cd = #{fuelTypeCd}, fuel_wght = #{fuelWght}, conv_fctr = #{convFctr}, co2_emsn = #{co2Emsn}, ofst_req_yn = #{ofstReqYn}, cef_redu_amt = #{cefReduAmt}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE er_id = #{erId} AND pair_sn = #{pairSn} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_cntry_pair_co2 (er_id, pair_sn, dprtr_cntry_cd, arvl_cntry_cd, cer_estm_yn, flt_cnt, fuel_type_cd, fuel_wght, conv_fctr, co2_emsn, ofst_req_yn, cef_redu_amt, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstErId}, pair_sn, dprtr_cntry_cd, arvl_cntry_cd, cer_estm_yn, flt_cnt, fuel_type_cd, fuel_wght, conv_fctr, co2_emsn, ofst_req_yn, cef_redu_amt, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM er.tn_er_cntry_pair_co2 WHERE er_id = #{srcErId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
